# Frontend Development Instructions

This file contains specific instructions for GitHub Copilot when working with frontend code.

## Framework Guidelines

- Follow modern JavaScript/TypeScript best practices
- Use ES6+ features and syntax
- Prefer const/let over var
- Use arrow functions where appropriate
- Follow component-based architecture patterns

## HTML/CSS

- Use semantic HTML elements
- Follow accessibility (a11y) best practices
- Use CSS Grid and Flexbox for layouts
- Implement responsive design principles
- Follow BEM methodology for CSS class naming

## JavaScript/TypeScript

- Use TypeScript for type safety where applicable
- Implement proper error handling with try/catch
- Use async/await for asynchronous operations
- Follow functional programming principles where appropriate
- Optimize for performance and bundle size

## React (if applicable)

- Use functional components with hooks
- Follow React best practices for state management
- Implement proper prop types or TypeScript interfaces
- Use React.memo for performance optimization
- Follow the single responsibility principle for components

## Testing

- Write unit tests for components and utilities
- Use testing libraries like Jest and React Testing Library
- Test user interactions and edge cases
- Mock external dependencies appropriately

## Performance

- Optimize images and assets
- Implement lazy loading where appropriate
- Minimize bundle size
- Use code splitting for large applications
- Monitor and optimize Core Web Vitals
